sentences.text_original: 你在干什么？站在这儿很久了。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zài gàn shénme? Zhàn zài zhèr hěn jiǔ le.
sentences.text_translation: Nima qilyapsan? Bu yerda ancha vaqtdan beri turibsan.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Что ты делаешь? Стоишь здесь уже давно.
sentences.text_translation_en: What are you doing? You've been standing here a long time.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我在排队买奶茶。这家店最近特别火。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ zài páiduì mǎi nǎichá. Zhè jiā diàn zuìjìn tèbié huǒ.
sentences.text_translation: Sut choyi olish uchun navbatda turibman. Bu do'kon yaqinda juda mashhur bo'lib ketdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я стою в очереди за молочным чаем. Это заведение в последнее время очень популярно.
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm queuing to buy milk tea. This shop has gotten really popular lately.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ pái le duō cháng shíjiān le?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько ты уже стоишь в очереди?
sentences.text_translation_en: How long have you been in line?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 已经排了半个小时了，前面还有十几个人。
sentences.pinyin: Yǐjīng pái le bàn ge xiǎoshí le, qiánmiàn hái yǒu shí jǐ ge rén.
sentences.text_translation: Yarim soat bo'ldi, oldinda hali o'n nechta odam bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Уже полчаса, впереди ещё человек десять с лишним.
sentences.text_translation_en: Half an hour already, and there are still a dozen or so people ahead.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 为了喝一杯奶茶等这么久，值得吗？
sentences.pinyin: Wèile hē yì bēi nǎichá děng zhème jiǔ, zhíde ma?
sentences.text_translation: Bir piyola sut choyi uchun shuncha kutish arziydimi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Стоить ли так долго ждать ради одного стакана молочного чая?
sentences.text_translation_en: Is it worth waiting this long for one cup of milk tea?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 听说这家的奶盖特别好喝，我朋友强烈推荐。
sentences.pinyin: Tīngshuō zhè jiā de nǎigài tèbié hǎo hē, wǒ péngyou qiángliè tuījiàn.
sentences.text_translation: Eshitishimcha, bularning sut ko'pigi juda mazali ekan, do'stim qattiq tavsiya qildi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Говорят, у них молочная пенка особенно вкусная, друг мне настоятельно её рекомендовал.
sentences.text_translation_en: I heard their milk foam is especially tasty — my friend strongly recommended it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那我也买一杯吧，跟你一起等。
sentences.pinyin: Nà wǒ yě mǎi yì bēi ba, gēn nǐ yìqǐ děng.
sentences.text_translation: Unda men ham bittasini olay, sen bilan birga kutaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда и я возьму стаканчик, подожду вместе с тобой.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then I'll buy a cup too and wait with you.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a! Nǐ xiǎng hē shénme kǒuwèi?
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! What flavor do you want?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我喜欢水果茶，比如柠檬茶或者百香果茶。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān shuǐguǒ chá, bǐrú níngméng chá huòzhě bǎixiāngguǒ chá.
sentences.text_translation: Men mevali choyni yoqtiraman, masalan limonli choy yoki marakuya choyi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я люблю фруктовый чай, например лимонный или с маракуйей.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like fruit tea, like lemon tea or passion fruit tea.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 他们家的水果茶也不错，很新鲜。
sentences.pinyin: Tāmen jiā de shuǐguǒ chá yě búcuò, hěn xīnxiān.
sentences.text_translation: Bularning mevali choyi ham yomon emas, juda yangi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Их фруктовый чай тоже неплох, очень свежий.
sentences.text_translation_en: Their fruit tea is good too — very fresh.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: So which one do you recommend?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我推荐招牌奶茶，奶盖很香。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ tuījiàn zhāopái nǎichá, nǎigài hěn xiāng.
sentences.text_translation: Men firma sut choyini tavsiya qilaman, sut ko'pigi juda xushbo'y.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я рекомендую фирменный молочный чай, у него ароматная пенка.
sentences.text_translation_en: I recommend the signature milk tea — the milk foam is very fragrant.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, nà jiù tīng nǐ de.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll go with your suggestion.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 快到了，还有五分钟就到我们了。
sentences.pinyin: Kuài dào le, hái yǒu wǔ fēnzhōng jiù dào wǒmen le.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinlashyapmiz, yana besh daqiqada navbatimiz keladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Уже скоро, через пять минут будет наша очередь.
sentences.text_translation_en: Almost there — five more minutes and it'll be our turn.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 太好了！等这么久，希望真的好喝。
sentences.pinyin: Tài hǎo le! Děng zhème jiǔ, xīwàng zhēn de hǎo hē.
sentences.text_translation: Juda yaxshi! Shuncha kutdik, umid qilamanki, rostdan mazali bo'lar.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! После такого долгого ожидания надеюсь, что он и правда вкусный.
sentences.text_translation_en: Great! After waiting this long, I hope it's really good.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Yídìng bú huì ràng nǐ shīwàng de!
sentences.speaker: B
